cases.description: Generated blog sounds too AI — humanize triggers the skill
cases.prompt: this blog post sounds like ChatGPT — humanize it
expectations: Runs Pass 1 — identifies at least one pattern from each of Content / Language / Style / Communication / Filler categories
Runs Soul Check to verify substance
Produces revised text with a brief summary of patterns fixed

cases.description: Stiff email text triggers the skill
cases.prompt: rewrite this email to sound less stiff and more natural
expectations: Removes chatbot pleasantries, sycophantic openers, knowledge-cutoff disclaimers
Final text has at least one specific detail or clear stance (Soul Check)

cases.description: Voice calibration from samples triggers the skill
cases.prompt: humanize this and match my voice — my samples are in .codi/skills/codi-humanizer/references/voice-samples/
expectations: Reads voice samples from the referenced directory
Extracts sentence length distribution, punctuation habits, formality level
Applies the voice profile in the rewrite
Cross-checks output against the profile in Soul Check

cases.description: Writing new content from scratch does NOT trigger humanizer
cases.prompt: write a blog post about our Q3 product launch
expectations: Routes to codi-content-factory for new content generation
Humanizer is only for rewriting existing AI-sounding text

cases.description: Code comments do NOT trigger humanizer
cases.prompt: clean up the comments in this TypeScript file
expectations: Routes to codi-refactoring or direct edits instead
Does NOT treat code comments as prose in need of humanization
